summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QC Hold/Quarantine feature (Depth #3a). Backend APIs fully functional with all QC flows working correctly. Frontend UI working for admin and manager roles. CRITICAL RBAC BUG: warehouse role cannot access QC Inspection menu despite configuration indicating they should have access.

backend_issues.notes: All backend QC endpoints working correctly. Data integrity verified (114 PASS, 0 FAIL).

critical_bugs.issue: QC Inspection menu NOT visible for warehouse role despite navigationConfig.js specifying roles: ['admin', 'warehouse', 'manager']
critical_bugs.impact: Warehouse users cannot access QC Inspection view, blocking their ability to perform QC inspections
critical_bugs.expected_behavior: Warehouse role should see 'Inspeksi QC' menu item in Gudang group
critical_bugs.actual_behavior: Gudang group shows 0 items for warehouse role (buildNavGroups returns empty items array)
critical_bugs.reproduction: 1. Login as warehouse@kainnusantara.id, 2. Expand Gudang group, 3. Observe no menu items shown

passed_tests: Backend: GR routes to quarantine (scan-receive → complete → qc_pending with quarantine roll created)
Backend: QC queue endpoint returns enriched tasks with all required fields
Backend: QC accept (full) - quarantine → available, task status=completed, qc_status=passed
Backend: QC reject return (partial) - creates Purchase Return (PRET-00003) with correct disposition
Backend: Data integrity verified (114 PASS, 0 FAIL)
Frontend: QC Inspection view loads correctly for admin role
Frontend: Metrics display correctly (tasks count, quarantine qty)
Frontend: Empty state displays when no tasks in queue
Frontend: QC Inspection menu visible and accessible for manager role
Frontend: All data-testid attributes present for testing

critical.issue: RBAC Bug - Warehouse role cannot access QC Inspection
critical.description: The buildNavGroups function in navigationConfig.js is returning an empty items array for the Gudang group when role='warehouse', despite the configuration specifying that warehouse should have access to multiple items including 'qc-inspection'. This blocks warehouse users from performing QC inspections.
critical.debug_info: When logged in as warehouse@kainnusantara.id, the Gudang group renders with 0 items. The group header is visible but clicking it shows no menu items. Other roles (admin, manager) work correctly.
critical.suggested_fix: Debug the buildNavGroups function to understand why items are being filtered out for warehouse role. Verify that the role string matching is case-sensitive and exact. Check if there's any additional filtering logic in the Sidebar component or App.js that might be removing items for warehouse role.

notes: Backend QC functionality is fully working and production-ready
Frontend UI components are well-designed and functional
Only the RBAC filtering for warehouse role needs to be fixed
After fixing the RBAC bug, warehouse users will be able to access and use the QC Inspection feature

gr_to_quarantine.details: Task transitions correctly: waiting_goods → (scan-receive) → qc_check → (complete) → qc_pending. Quarantine roll created with status='quarantine', qc_task_id set correctly.

qc_queue.details: Returns array of qc_pending tasks enriched with product_name, sku, supplier_name, po_number, warehouse_name, quarantine_qty. Seeded task (Batik Mega Mendung Premium, 75m) found in queue.

qc_accept_full.details: Accepted 120m, task status=completed, qc_status=passed. Quarantine stock moved to available.

qc_reject_return.details: Partial accept (45m) + reject return (30m) created Purchase Return PRET-00003 with status=pending_approval, stock_adjusted=true, source=qc_reject.

validations.details: All validations working: over-allocation (400), both zero (400), non-qc_pending task (400).

data_integrity.details: verify_data_integrity.py: 114 PASS, 0 FAIL. All invariants valid including roll-as-SSOT, balance integrity, and number-series uniqueness.

qc_view_load.details: QC Inspection view (data-testid='qc-inspection-view') loads correctly with metrics, queue, and empty state.

metrics_display.details: Metrics tiles (qc-metric-tasks, qc-metric-quarantine) display correctly with counts and quantities.

empty_state.details: Empty state (data-testid='qc-empty') displays correctly when no tasks in queue: 'Tidak ada barang menunggu QC'

rbac_admin.details: Admin role can see and access QC Inspection menu in Gudang group.

rbac_manager.details: Manager role can see and access QC Inspection menu in Gudang group.

rbac_warehouse.details: Warehouse role CANNOT see QC Inspection menu. Gudang group shows 0 items despite configuration indicating warehouse should have access.
